user.title: AWS Infrastructure Monitor
user.description: Configure your AWS account for monitoring

data_description.account_name: A friendly name for this AWS account
data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often to poll AWS APIs (5-60 minutes)
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Enables history graphs for resource counts (uses more sensors)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid AWS credentials. Please check your Access Key ID and Secret Access Key.

abort.already_configured: This AWS account is already configured.

data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often to poll AWS APIs (5-60 minutes)
data_description.cost_refresh_interval: How often to check AWS Cost Explorer (60-1440 minutes). Cost data updates once daily, checking more often wastes money ($0.01 per API call).
data_description.region_mode: Choose whether to monitor all regions or select specific ones
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Enables history graphs for resource counts (uses more sensors)
data_description.skip_initial_refresh: Speeds up Home Assistant startup (data appears after first refresh cycle)

data_description.regions: Select one or more AWS regions. Deselect all to monitor no regions.
